# Chirps & Roar

Chirps & Roar helps travelers discover verified local birding, wildlife, tracking and nature guides, check public availability, talk directly, and request a booking. Guides confirm requests; payments are arranged directly with the guide and only recorded operationally by the platform.

## Canonical public resources
- Homepage and guide search: /
- Location collections: /location/{location-slug}
- Specialty collections: /specialty/{specialty-slug}
- Current index: /sitemap.xml

## Trust and data notes
- Only approved guide profiles appear publicly.
- Ratings come from reviews tied to completed platform bookings.
- Availability and event details are supplied by guides and may change.
- Collection pages exist only when real approved inventory exists.
